name: Vertical Bottle Series
description: Optimized inline architecture for seamless auto-filling lines. Available variants: 50ml to 1L configurations.

name: Amway Shape Series
description: Ergonomic shoulder profile featuring robust impact-drop walls. Ideal for chemicals and concentrates.

name: Heavy Industrial Jerry Cans
description: Built for hazardous material compliance. High stack loading capacity up to 20-liter volumes.

name: Cyzenda Bottle Series
description: Heavy-duty specialty design built with strict volumetric tolerances for premium agrochemical concentrates.

name: Standard Wide-Mouth Jars
description: Excellent seal profile optimized for powder chemical compounds, tablet sorting, and pharmaceutical solid packing.
